_comment: Owner Action Queue — the single most important list. Only what needs the OWNER right now. Ordered by priority (high first). priority: high | medium | low. kind: confirm | configure | review | merge | test | decide.

items.title: Confirm the frontier-al folder/repo for Aether Wing
items.action: Tell the next agent exactly where Aether Wing should be built (which repo + folder). No Frontier / Aether Wing gameplay starts until this is confirmed.
items.blocks: FRONTIER: Aether Wing Phase 1, frontier-al scaffold

items.title: Configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/* (now also covers /lab/mission-control)
items.where: Cloudflare Zero Trust → Access → Applications → Self-hosted
items.action: Add your-domain/lab and /lab/* to an Access app with an Allow policy = your email(s). Until then, /lab and /lab/mission-control are reachable by URL in production. See docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md.
items.blocks: Safe sharing of any deployed /lab link

items.title: Review GrowVerse plant review panel — PR #27 (CI + visual)
items.where: GrowVerse repo · PR #27 (cross-repo — not visible from devbiz; status below is reported, not verified here)
items.action: Check CI state and do the visual review on PR #27, then decide merge/hold.

items.title: Review & test this Mission Control PR
items.action: Open /lab and /lab/mission-control locally, confirm the dashboard renders, then mark the PR ready / merge when satisfied.
items.blocks: Resuming feature/game work (owner froze new lanes until Mission Control v1 exists)

items.title: Decide on the three open Devbiz draft PRs
items.where: KudbeeZero/devbiz · PR #6 (AI concierge), #20 (Code Lens spec), #14 (ledger reconcile)
items.action: Each is a draft awaiting an owner decision (merge, hold, or close). None are blocking Mission Control.
